calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2022 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Written Discovery Answers
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SERGIO ORANTES' Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Written Discovery Answers.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO DEFENDANT ORANTES' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY REQUESTS. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION AND ENTERED AN ORDER AS FOLLOWING:

(1) WITHIN TWENTY DAYS (20) FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE DEFENDANT WITH FULL AND COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET 1), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET 1) AND FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET 1)

(2) THERE WAS NO REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AND NONE WILL BE ASSESSED

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER BY EMAIL TO rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
